ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Type of study design (e.g., within-subjects, between-subjects) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the experiment */,
  "recruitment_status" INTEGER /* Indicator if participant recruitment is complete */,
  "data_collection_status" INTEGER /* Indicator if data collection is complete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is enrolled in */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date participant consent was obtained */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date participant withdrew from the study (if applicable) */,
  "participant_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., active, inactive, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the experiment */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for stimulus used in the trial */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the stimulus */,
  "arousal" REAL /* Arousal score of the stimulus */,
  "interference" INTEGER /* Interference score related to the trial */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., IAPS, MSIT) */,
  "response_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions given to participants for the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, video) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the stimulus file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus content */,
  "stimulus_category" TEXT /* Category of the stimulus (e.g., neutral, positive, negative) */,
  "stimulus_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the stimulus (e.g., animal, person, object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant giving the response */,
  "response_key" INTEGER /* Key associated with the participant's response */,
  "response_correct" INTEGER /* Indicator if the response was correct */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken for the response in seconds */,
  "response_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty level of the response */,
  "response_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key */,
  "key_value" INTEGER /* Value of the key used in responses */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the key and its use */,
  "key_type" TEXT /* Type of key (e.g., correct, incorrect, unsure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated participant */,
  "data_validity" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the data is valid */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on data quality */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating data quality (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Principal Investigator, Research Assistant) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_review_board" (
  "irb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IRB approval */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "irb_approval_date" TEXT /* Date of IRB approval */,
  "irb_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date of IRB expiration */,
  "irb_protocol_number" TEXT /* IRB protocol number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_review_board_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "informed_consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent form */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated participant */,
  "consent_form_version" TEXT /* Version of the consent form */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the participant signed the consent form */,
  "consent_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the participant (electronic or physical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_informed_consent_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
